zh.lifeSummary: 當Margueritte de Savoie於1215年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊時，她的父親Amadeus IV Count of Savoy18歲，母親Mathilde de Bourgogne23歲。她去世於1254年在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左享年39歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯德o姆波恩利額-素-盧比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margueritte de Savoie于1215年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊时，她的父亲Amadeus IV Count of Savoy18岁，母亲Mathilde de Bourgogne23岁。她去世于1254年在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左享年39岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯德o姆波恩利額-素-盧比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Margueritte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Margueritte de Savoie was born in 1215, in Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, was 18 and her mother, Mathilde de Bourgogne, was 23. She died in 1254, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 39, and was buried in Bonlieu-sur-Roubion, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margueritte de Savoie est née en 1215, à Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Bourgogne, avait 23 ans. Elle est décédée en 1254, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Bonlieu-sur-Roubion, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margueritte de Savoie 1215 in Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amadeus IV Count of Savoy 18 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Bourgogne 23. Sie starb 1254 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien und wurde in Bonlieu-sur-Roubion, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margueritte de Savoie è nata il nel 1215 nel Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Bourgogne, aveva 23 anni. Morì nel 1254, nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Bonlieu-sur-Roubion, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margueritte de Savoieが1215年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイで生まれた時，父Amadeus IV Count of Savoyは18歳，母Mathilde de Bourgogneは23歳であった。彼女は1254年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで39歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスドルoメボンリーウ-スル-ロウビオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margueritte de Savoie(이)가 1215년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amadeus IV Count of Savoy(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Bourgogne(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1254년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 드o 본리우-수-루비언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margueritte de Savoie nasceu em 1215, em Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Bourgogne, tinha 23 anos. Ela faleceu em 1254, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Bonlieu-sur-Roubion, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margueritte de Savoie родилась в 1215 г. в местности савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Amadeus IV Count of Savoy было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Bourgogne, 23. Она умерла в 1254 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности бонлиеу-сур-роубион, дрoм, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margueritte de Savoie nació en 1215, en Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Amadeus IV Count of Savoy, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Bourgogne, tenía 23 años. Murió en 1254, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Bonlieu-sur-Roubion, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
